titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Standing Committee on Professional Awareness, Yale University Library, Records
Standing Committee on Professional Awareness, Yale University Library, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 08:56

did.unittitle: Standing Committee on Professional Awareness, Yale University Library, records
did.abstract: The records consist of memoranda, minutes, agendas, videotapes, and correspondence documenting the operations and activities of the Standing Committee on Professional Awareness (SCOPA) at Yale University Library.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 32-F (YRG 32-F), Records of Yale University Library staff organizations.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is partially restricted. See inventory for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Standing Committee on Professional Awareness, Yale University Library, Records (RU 154). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of memoranda, minutes, agendas, videotapes, and correspondence documenting the operations and activities of the Standing Committee on Professional Awareness (SCOPA) at Yale University Library.

did.unittitle: Records of SCOPA and co-chair subject files

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: No online inventory. Inventory available in repository.

did.unittitle: Records of SCOPA and co-chair subject files
Records of SCOPA and co-chair subject files
Records of the chair of the Standing Committee on Professional Awareness
"Scholarly Electronic Publishing in the 21stCentury: Trends, Models, and Impacts on Information Services. A Three Part Series"
Committee records maintained by, Nancy Kuhl
Records of the Standing Committee on Professional Awareness
Copy of Talk of the Nation Program featuring Ann Okerson

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy of non-commercially produced items for their personal use should consult the ordering reproductions information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

did.unittitle: Copyright Discussion, Yale Law School featuring Susan Kornfield
Correspondence, memoranda, reports, and grant applications maintained by the committee chair, SCOPA
Records maintained by Diane Turner, committee sponsor, SCOPA
